indications.text:
MOVANTIK (naloxegol) is indicated for the treatment of opioid-induced constipation (OIC)
in adult patients with chronic non-cancer pain.

MOVANTIK® (naloxegol) is indicated for the treatment of opioid-induced constipation (OIC) in adult patients with
chronic non-cancer pain.

MOVANTIK® is indicated for the treatment of opioid-induced constipation (OIC) in adult patients with chronic non-
cancer pain, including patients with chronic pain related to prior cancer or its treatment who do not require frequent (e.g.,
weekly) opioid dosage escalation.

MOVANTIK® is indicated for the treatment of opioid-induced constipation (OIC) in adult patients with chronic non-
cancer pain, including patients with chronic pain related to prior cancer or its treatment who do not require frequent (e.g.,
weekly) opioid dosage escalation.

MOVANTIK® is indicated for the treatment of opioid-induced constipation (OIC) in adult patients with chronic non-
cancer pain, including patients with chronic pain related to prior cancer or its treatment who do not require frequent (e.g.,
weekly) opioid dosage escalation.

MOVANTIK® (naloxegol) is indicated for the treatment of opioid-induced constipation (OIC) in adult patients with
chronic non-cancer pain.

MOVANTIK (naloxegol) is indicated for the treatment of opioid-induced constipation (OIC)
in adult patients with chronic non-cancer pain.

MOVANTIK® is indicated for the treatment of opioid-induced constipation (OIC) in adult patients with chronic non-
cancer pain, including patients with chronic pain related to prior cancer or its treatment who do not require frequent (e.g.,
weekly) opioid dosage escalation.
